name: Muhammad Hashim Abdul—Azîm
tagline: Engineering leader, architect, principal — many hats, literally and metaphorically.

roles.title: GenAI Architect / Principal Engineer
roles.scope: Own GenAI architecture and engineering practice across Celfocus AI Programs.
outcomes: Defining reference architectures and adoption patterns for GenAI across teams.

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.scope: Governed solution architecture, QA, delivery, and tech-debt across the PMO's programs.
outcomes: Shipped a career-levelling model, a {{hiring playground}}, and GenAI engineering practices; drove mentorship.

roles.title: Principal Engineer
roles.scope: Architecture and software leadership across product teams.
outcomes: Set engineering standards and mentored engineers across the practice.

experience.title: Software Engineering Lead
experience.scope: Owned the SDLC and architecture for a hospitality-tech platform.
outcomes: Introduced a career-levelling model, TDD/BDD, and a microservice architecture.

experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.scope: R&D and platform work on the mobile SDK and CI.
outcomes: Cut yearly CI/CD tooling costs; authored internal JSON-API & DB-layer specs; planned the Android Studio plugin.

experience.title: Digitalisation Technology Consultant
experience.scope: Advised on data-center architecture, automation, and talent acquisition.

experience.title: Corporal · Senior Full-Stack Engineer
experience.scope: Led 6 engineers building internal telecom & comms systems.
outcomes: Shipped an SMS gateway, e-fax, and VoIP IVR on a Proxmox / pfSense stack.

earlier.name: ElCoach
